By connecting identity intelligence, compliance, transaction integrity, and internal controls, organizations can build more resilient and customer-conscious fraud prevention systems._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for professionals in AI, cybersecurity, digital banking, fraud prevention, and enterprise risk management, this session offers a practical framework for using AI to strengthen trust, improve decision-making, and build scalable security architectures for the future of financial services.
tagline: Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU)

title: Governance by Design: Architecting Compliance-Critical Enterprise Case Processing Systems
description:
Enterprise case processing systems in regulated environments must do more than manage workflows; they must preserve procedural integrity, accountability, and legal defensibility under real operational conditions. Yet many systems treat governance as an administrative layer added on top of flexible tools, leaving institutions exposed to procedural gaps, inconsistent access controls, incomplete audit trails, and unreliable decision records._x000D_
_x000D_
This presentation introduces a governance-centred architectural framework for compliance-critical case processing. The framework treats compliance not as a supervisory function, but as a system invariant: something structurally enforced across every case, role, transition, and failure scenario. Drawing on institutional theory, secure systems engineering, and distributed systems research, it defines four core architectural pillars._x000D_
_x000D_
First, deterministic lifecycle enforcement uses finite state machine modelling to restrict case progression to authorised transitions across defined procedural stages, including submission, intake review, investigation, adjudication, decision, appeal, and closure. Second, hierarchical authorisation enforcement aligns role-based and lattice-oriented access controls with institutional authority structures, reducing permission sprawl and preventing inappropriate access escalation. Third, immutable audit architecture applies cryptographic hash chaining to append-only logs, capturing actor identity, case state changes, synchronised timestamps, and integrity proofs suitable for regulatory inspection and judicial review. Fourth, distributed reliability uses causal event ordering and fault-tolerant state replication to preserve governance consistency across multi-node infrastructures, including during network partitions and system failures._x000D_
_x000D_
Together, these components establish governance invariance: structural enforcement of procedural rules across all operational states. The proposed architecture is applicable to public sector adjudication, financial services compliance, investigative case management, and other accountability-intensive domains where compliance cannot depend solely on human supervision or after-the-fact auditing.
tagline: Independent Researcher, USA

title: Our SDLC Journey with AI
description:
AI is changing how we build software, but its real value comes when it supports the whole SDLC, not only code generation._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, we will walk through a realistic feature delivery journey with GitHub Copilot: understanding the user story, validating acceptance criteria, planning, implementation, security review, and pull request validation._x000D_
_x000D_
We will show how skills, custom agents, MCP integrations, and organization-level instructions can help teams break down work, accelerate development, and apply consistent engineering standards._x000D_
_x000D_
We will also cover practical security checkpoints, including secure coding review, linting, dependency risk with Dependabot, and PR review guidance aligned with organizational guardrails._x000D_
_x000D_
The goal is not to present AI as a shortcut, but as a practical teammate that helps teams deliver faster, with better quality and stronger security built into the process._x000D_
_x000D_
tagline: Software Development Engineer

title: Security by design en GitHub
description: Descubre cómo llevar la seguridad a tus desarrollos desde el primer momento, integrándola de forma natural en todo tu workflow en GitHub. En esta charla veremos cómo trabajar para construir software más seguro sin sacrificar velocidad ni experiencia. Exploraremos automatización, análisis continuo y gestión de vulnerabilidades directamente en el flujo de trabajo diario. Convierte la plataforma en tu mejor aliada para prevenir riesgos antes de que ocurran. Porque la seguridad ya no es un paso extra… es parte del código desde el primer minuto.
tagline: Most Valuable Secure Cloud & Devops Engineer in Devoteam

title: Building Self-Healing APIs with Intelligent Monitoring and Auto-Scaling
description:
Modern applications depend on APIs to connect services, automate business processes, and deliver reliable digital experiences. However, maintaining API availability in distributed cloud environments remains a significant challenge as workloads fluctuate and failures occur unexpectedly._x000D_
_x000D_
This session presents a practical framework for autonomous API health management that combines continuous monitoring, real-time anomaly detection, automated recovery, and adaptive scaling. Using cloud-native orchestration and monitoring capabilities, the solution identifies service degradation, redirects traffic when necessary, restarts affected components, and dynamically adjusts resources to maintain service continuity._x000D_
_x000D_
Through real-world implementation patterns and architecture walkthroughs, attendees will learn how to build self-healing API platforms that reduce downtime and improve operational resilience. The session will demonstrate how intelligent monitoring pipelines can be integrated with automated failover and scaling strategies to respond to changing system conditions without manual intervention._x000D_
_x000D_
Key results show improvements in recovery time, service availability, and infrastructure utilization under varying load scenarios. The discussion will also cover common implementation challenges, operational considerations, and future opportunities such as predictive failure detection and intelligent capacity planning._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will leave with practical guidance and reproducible approaches for implementing resilient API architectures using widely adopted cloud-native technologies.
tagline: Sr. Full Stack Developer at Allstate Silutions Pvt Ltd.

title: Building Enterprise AI Agents with MCP and Production Governance
description:
As organizations adopt AI agents to automate operational workflows, ensuring governance, security, and reliable integration with enterprise systems becomes increasingly important. This session presents real-world implementation patterns for deploying enterprise AI agents using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) across 14 enterprise systems in production environments supporting more than 10,000 customers._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will learn how MCP simplified enterprise integrations, reducing implementation effort by 73% and lowering average tool integration time from 120 engineering hours to 32 hours per integration. The session explores the architecture behind four autonomous AI agents that process more than 4,200 operational events daily through a governance model combining direct execution, permission-gated actions, and human-in-the-loop escalation controls._x000D_
_x000D_
The talk also covers practical governance techniques, including permission manifest architectures that embed role-based access control, rate limiting, and scope restrictions directly into MCP integrations. These controls reduced unauthorized tool invocations from 3.2 incidents per week to zero. Additional topics include confidence-gated orchestration models achieving 91% operational decision accuracy and autonomous vulnerability remediation systems that resolved more than 35,000 CVEs in production environments._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will gain practical implementation guidance, architectural patterns, governance frameworks, and security lessons that can be applied when building secure, scalable, and production-ready AI agent solutions.
tagline: Independent Researcher

title: La verdad en la IA
description: En esta sesión veremos algún caso de desarrollo sorprendente y algún sorprendente desarrollo. El problema en la formación del equipo y el pensamiento crítico. Y terminamos viendo una muestra de como aplicarlo a la hora de realizar pruebas sobre nuestros sistemas de IA
tagline: Expert Architect - NTT DATA

title: De la Fatiga por Alertas al Tuning Autónomo con Security Copilot
description:
_x000D_
Las reglas analíticas de Microsoft Sentinel son un aspecto fundamental en la detección de amenazas, pero también pueden convertirse en una fuente importante de fatiga de alertas cuando las detecciones ruidosas poco ajustadas, los incidentes duplicados, las asignaciones de entidades débiles y los umbrales obsoletos no se ajustan de forma continua. Mediante el uso de agentes personalizados en Security Copilot veremos una manera práctica de convertir los flujos de trabajo de optimización en experiencias guiadas para analistas._x000D_
_x000D_
Esta charla explica cómo crear agentes personalizados de Security Copilot para optimizar reglas analíticas de Sentinel. Crearemos un agente interactivo que recupera definiciones de reglas, explica KQL y la configuración de reglas, identifica reglas ruidosas a partir de datos reales de incidentes de Sentinel, analiza entidades de alta frecuencia, recomienda ajustes seguros, valida el impacto en KQL y aplica actualizaciones de reglas aprobadas._x000D_
_x000D_
Los asistentes aprenderán a diseñar el manifiesto del agente, combinar habilidades de tipo Agente, GPT, KQL y API, escribir instrucciones de orquestación, implementar operaciones de escritura con aprobación previa y evitar errores comunes al crear automatización de seguridad sobre detecciones en producción._x000D_
tagline: Security and AI Architect at BlueVoyant

title: Evitando el efecto queso suizo en la adopción de Copilot
description:
La adopción de Copilot no va solo de tecnología: va, sobre todo, de personas._x000D_
_x000D_
En esta sesión exploraremos qué sucede realmente cuando un cambio impulsado por la IA aterriza en una organización: por qué saltarse la gestión del cambio genera stoppers y “agujeros” invisibles que frenan la adopción —convirtiendo la organización en un auténtico queso suizo— y cómo un enfoque estructurado como ADKAR ayuda a evitarlos._x000D_
_x000D_
Hablaremos de por qué el acompañamiento en la adopción es clave para apoyar la transición de las personas, desde la incertidumbre inicial hasta el uso efectivo y confiado de Copilot, y de cómo no abordarlo de forma consciente termina provocando resistencias, desconfianza y abandono temprano._x000D_
_x000D_
Una sesión participativa y muy aterrizada a la realidad, centrada en riesgos reales y en acciones concretas para construir una adopción sostenible, medible y alineada con el negocio._x000D_
_x000D_
¿Qué se llevarán de la sesión?_x000D_
_x000D_
- Cómo diseñar programas de acompañamiento en la adopción de Microsoft 365 Copilot que apoyen a las personas durante todo el proceso de cambio._x000D_
- Los pilares clave del éxito en la adopción, más allá de licencias, despliegues técnicos o formaciones puntuales._x000D_
- Cómo medir la adopción más allá del “lo he usado”, identificando indicadores reales de valor, impacto y madurez en el uso de Copilot._x000D_
_x000D_
Una charla para quienes saben que implementar Copilot es relativamente fácil; lograr que cale de verdad en la organización, no tanto.
tagline: Devoteam, Change Managment Lead Consultant & Lead Presales

title: Applied AI for Federal Permitting in Historic Districts
description:
This session shows how Artificial Intelligence can be applied to a real and reproducible regulatory automation use case: federal permitting review under NEPA and Section 106 for projects in historic districts and protected areas. The goal is to explain, in a practical and accessible way, how to combine language models, computer vision, geospatial analysis, and retrieval-augmented reasoning to reduce manual work, improve traceability, and accelerate decisions without losing human oversight._x000D_
_x000D_
The use case focuses on infrastructure, telecommunications, utility, and defense projects that must evaluate Categorical Exclusions, potential impacts on National Register properties, height changes, ground disturbance, right-of-way restrictions, and other relevant criteria. The architecture integrates data from construction drawings, GIS boundaries, imagery, LiDAR, and services such as Google Street View, NPS IRMA, FCC ULS, EPA ECHO, and USGS 3DEP._x000D_
_x000D_
During the talk, attendees will learn how a multitechnology solution can orchestrate APIs in parallel, interpret technical documentation, generate compliance evidence, and support coordination across agencies. The session also explains how this approach can reduce repetitive tasks in routine permitting workflows, such as small-cell deployments, while maintaining clear criteria for escalating sensitive cases to human experts._x000D_
_x000D_
This session is designed for developers, automation specialists, data professionals, and AI enthusiasts looking for applicable examples of how emerging technologies can become useful, traceable solutions connected to real community needs.
tagline: Technology Partner Aka Principal Solutions Architect at Tech Mahindra

title: Applied AI for Scalable Banking Advisory Optimization
description:
This session presents a practical case of how Artificial Intelligence can become a real and applicable solution for improving banking advisory services, operational efficiency, and data-driven decision-making. Through an AI-enabled decision support system, the session shows how machine learning, natural language processing, advanced analytics, and predictive modeling can support modern, scalable financial processes._x000D_
_x000D_
The approach integrates structured and unstructured data, including transactions, behavioral patterns, and financial history, to generate intelligent client profiles, personalized recommendations, compliance alerts, and useful meeting briefs for advisors. A key component is predictive life-event modeling, which helps anticipate customer needs and support more proactive financial planning._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience interested in reproducible and applicable use cases, the session explains the conceptual architecture, main workflows, and an implementation roadmap that combines intelligent automation with human oversight. The goal is to show how AI can help move up to 60% of client interactions into more efficient advisory workflows while maintaining customer satisfaction, transparency, trust, and regulatory compliance._x000D_
_x000D_
Rather than presenting a purely theoretical view, this talk connects AI, automation, analytics, and user experience in a concrete financial scenario. It demonstrates how these technologies can deliver useful solutions for organizations and communities building the digital future.
tagline: Vice President Software Engineering at JPMorganChase & Co

title: Fair AI in Practice: Detecting and Reducing Algorithmic Bias
description:
As artificial intelligence becomes part of real-world digital solutions, teams need practical ways to ensure that AI systems are accurate, fair, and trustworthy. This session focuses on how algorithmic bias appears in statistical models and how developers, data professionals, and technology communities can identify and reduce it using reproducible, data-driven methods._x000D_
_x000D_
The talk will explain how bias can enter AI systems through data collection, model design, and demographic factors, with examples from high-impact areas such as hiring, lending, healthcare, and facial recognition. It will then present a practical framework for detecting, measuring, and mitigating bias using fairness metrics, model evaluation techniques, discrimination-aware training, bias-adversarial augmentation, and regular auditing._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience, this session connects ethical AI concepts with implementation practices that can be applied across modern AI workflows, cloud-based systems, business applications, and intelligent automation scenarios. Attendees will learn how to evaluate fairness-performance trade-offs, prepare for evolving compliance expectations, and integrate responsible AI checks into development and governance processes._x000D_
_x000D_
By the end of the session, participants will have actionable guidance for building AI solutions that are not only technically effective, but also equitable, explainable, and aligned with community trust. The goal is to make responsible AI practical, accessible, and applicable for teams building the future of digital technology.
tagline: Analyst at TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES

title: Building Ethical AI Data Pipelines with Practical Engineering Controls
description:
As artificial intelligence becomes part of real business applications, automation platforms, cloud solutions, and digital products, data engineers play a critical role in making these systems trustworthy. This session explores how ethical data engineering can turn privacy, fairness, and transparency from abstract principles into practical controls that teams can apply in real projects._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience, this talk connects AI, data engineering, cloud platforms, business applications, and responsible automation. We will examine how sensitive data can be exposed in AI workflows, how biased datasets can create unfair outcomes, and how engineering practices can reduce these risks before they reach production._x000D_
_x000D_
Using practical examples from e-commerce and healthcare, the session will show how to introduce privacy-preserving techniques, bias detection, careful feature selection, fairness-aware engineering, documentation, and ethical review points across the data pipeline. These steps help teams build AI-ready systems that are more secure, explainable, and aligned with user expectations._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will leave with a reproducible framework they can adapt to their own projects, whether they work with AI applications, cloud data platforms, automation tools, or business apps. The goal is to help developers, data professionals, and technology communities build solutions that are not only innovative, but also responsible, transparent, and beneficial to society.
tagline: Senior Data Engineer at Amazon

title: Agentic AI and LLM-Powered RPA for Practical Automation
description:
This session explores how Robotic Process Automation is evolving through Agentic AI frameworks and Large Language Models, turning traditional rule-based automation into intelligent, adaptable business solutions. Designed for a multitechnology audience, the talk connects AI, automation, business applications, and cloud-ready architectures to show how organizations can move from repetitive task automation to context-aware process execution._x000D_
_x000D_
Traditional RPA has helped teams automate structured and repetitive work, but many real business processes still involve unstructured data, exceptions, changing rules, and human decision points. This session explains how Agentic Process Automation addresses these challenges by combining perception, cognitive processing, action planning, and execution frameworks._x000D_
_x000D_
Using practical examples from financial services, healthcare, and customer service, the session highlights measurable outcomes such as reduced manual intervention, higher process automation rates, lower automation total cost of ownership, improved accuracy, and faster decision-making. It also discusses how AI-powered automation can support unstructured data extraction and complex workflow handling._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will gain a clear, accessible roadmap for designing and implementing intelligent automation responsibly. The session covers architecture patterns, implementation strategies, governance, risk management, and lessons learned from enterprise deployments. Participants will leave with practical ideas they can apply to build scalable, resilient, and business-focused automation solutions using Agentic AI and LLMs.
tagline: NIT Warangal, India

title: Enterprise Integration with Oracle SOA, Microservices, and Cloud
description:
As organizations modernize their digital platforms, one of the biggest challenges is connecting legacy enterprise systems with secure, scalable, and cloud-ready microservices. This session presents a practical and reproducible approach to enterprise integration using Oracle SOA Suite, Spring Boot microservices, Apache Kafka, REST and SOAP interoperability, API governance, workflow automation, and OAuth-based security._x000D_
_x000D_
Focused on real-world implementation patterns, the talk explains how enterprises can modernize monolithic environments without disrupting existing investments. Attendees will learn how to design synchronous and asynchronous workflows, support real-time transaction processing, improve data consistency across heterogeneous systems, and apply integration practices that strengthen governance, security compliance, resilience, and performance._x000D_
_x000D_
The session also shares measurable implementation insights from the original research, including transaction success rates of 95% to 99% across batch, real-time, near real-time, and asynchronous processing models, response efficiency between 88% and 95%, 88% implementation success for automated testing initiatives, 85% API management adoption, and scalability implementation metrics reaching 80% across distributed architectures._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for enterprise architects, integration specialists, cloud engineers, developers, and technology leaders, this session connects enterprise integration concepts with practical modernization strategies that can be adapted to complex digital environments.
tagline: Principal Consultant at Creoal + SMX

title: Building Smarter Employee Experiences with HR Tech and AI
description:
HR technology is no longer only an internal operations tool. It has become a practical technology ecosystem that connects data, automation, business applications, analytics, and intelligent decision-making to improve how employees experience work._x000D_
_x000D_
This session explores how Human Resource Information Systems, or HRIS, can improve the full employee lifecycle, from recruitment and onboarding to well-being, rewards, performance, and offboarding. Designed for a multitechnology audience, the talk will focus on real and applicable use cases that show how integrated HR platforms can reduce manual work, improve data accuracy, streamline recruitment, and support better people decisions._x000D_
_x000D_
The session will also connect HRIS transformation with trends that are reshaping digital solutions, including intelligent automation, predictive analytics, hyper-personalization, and AI-assisted employee journeys. Attendees will see how these capabilities can help organizations identify retention risks earlier, create more personalized experiences, and make HR services more responsive, efficient, and human-centered._x000D_
_x000D_
Beyond the technology, the session will highlight the practical success factors that determine whether HRIS initiatives deliver lasting value, including clean data integration, user-friendly design, effective change management, measurable outcomes, and continuous improvement._x000D_
_x000D_
By the end, participants will understand how HRIS, automation, analytics, and AI can work together to create employee experiences that are more connected, efficient, and impactful while supporting both employee satisfaction and organizational performance.
tagline: Senior Manager - Implementation Delivery - ADP Lyric HCM ADP Technology Services

title: Predictive AI for Smarter Finance and Vendor Risk
description:
This session presents a practical and reproducible use case for applying Artificial Intelligence, automation, and cloud-enabled business applications to real enterprise finance challenges. It focuses on how AI-powered predictive automation can improve invoice approvals and vendor risk assessment by helping finance teams classify invoices, identify low-risk transactions for automated approval, and flag higher-risk cases for manual review._x000D_
_x000D_
Using the original finance workflow as context, the session will explain how historical vendor and invoice data can be prepared, modeled, and integrated into business processes to reduce manual effort, improve decision accuracy, accelerate approvals, and strengthen fraud and vendor risk controls. The talk will cover key technical foundations such as data preprocessing, model selection, risk scoring, enterprise integration, and the use of machine learning models including XGBoost and LightGBM._x000D_
_x000D_
The content is designed for a multitechnology audience interested in AI, intelligent automation, Business Apps, Power Apps, Copilot-style decision support, and Azure-based innovation. Attendees will see how predictive AI can move finance operations from traditional rules-based processing toward intelligent, risk-based decisioning that is measurable, secure, and applicable in real organizations._x000D_
_x000D_
By the end of the session, participants will understand how to design an AI-assisted finance automation approach that supports operational efficiency, compliance, auditability, and strategic decision-making, while remaining practical enough to adapt to their own business scenarios.
tagline: University of Dayton Ohio

title: Practical AI for SAP Integration in Enterprise M&A
description:
Mergers and acquisitions often make enterprise system integration one of the most complex parts of digital transformation. This session presents a practical case study of how a global enterprise used artificial intelligence to accelerate SAP integration, including the consolidation of multiple SAP environments and migration from SAP ECC to S/4HANA across multiple jurisdictions._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience, the session focuses on real, applicable lessons rather than theory. Attendees will learn how AI-supported data mapping, pattern recognition, predictive analytics, and automation helped reduce manual effort, improve data quality, and identify integration risks before they affected the business._x000D_
_x000D_
The AI-powered framework accelerated the integration timeline by 40%, reduced overall costs by 30%, and maintained 99.8% business continuity throughout the transition. Neural networks reduced data mapping time by 76% compared with traditional methods, while achieving 99.3% first-pass migration accuracy across 15 TB of transactional and master data._x000D_
_x000D_
The case study also shows how the team handled more than 3,000 custom ABAP objects and maintained compliance across GDPR, SOX, and HIPAA with zero violations during integration. Beyond the merger, the initiative delivered lasting benefits, including a 28% reduction in annual IT operational costs, 63% faster deployment of new capabilities, and improved transaction completion times._x000D_
_x000D_
This session will help technology professionals, developers, architects, and business application teams understand how AI can turn complex enterprise integration into a practical, scalable, and business-focused accelerator for modernization.
tagline: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU)

title: Practical Agentic AI Document Pipelines on AWS
description:
Organizations still rely on manual effort to process large volumes of unstructured documents such as PDFs, contracts, forms, and reports. Traditional Intelligent Document Processing systems often depend on rigid templates and static workflows, which makes them hard to scale and adapt when business needs change._x000D_
_x000D_
This session presents a practical, reproducible approach to building scalable AI document processing pipelines on AWS. Using Amazon S3, AWS Lambda, AWS Step Functions, Amazon Textract, and Amazon Bedrock, attendees will learn how to design a serverless architecture for document ingestion, parallel processing, structured extraction, metadata generation, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation workflows._x000D_
_x000D_
The session focuses on real implementation patterns that developers and technology teams can apply beyond a demo environment. It explains how distributed orchestration, map-based workflows, chunking, page-level inference, schema generation, and embedding-based discovery can help process large document collections efficiently while maintaining visibility through Amazon CloudWatch._x000D_
_x000D_
The talk also explores how document processing can evolve from traditional automation into agentic AI workflows using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. Specialized AI agents can support document classification, information extraction, output validation, failure detection, and adaptive improvement of extraction quality._x000D_
_x000D_
Security and responsible implementation are included through PII and PHI detection, encryption with AWS KMS, IAM-based access control, and secure serverless deployment practices. Attendees will leave with practical architectural patterns, implementation guidance, and ideas they can adapt to build resilient, cost-efficient, enterprise-scale AI document intelligence solutions.
tagline: Technical Architect, DEV LEAD at MIO Partners Inc. | New York, NY

title: Building Secure and Resilient Performance Workflows
description:
Modern software teams are under constant pressure to deliver fast, reliable, and scalable digital solutions. At the same time, security must be treated as part of everyday engineering, not as a final checkpoint before release. This session presents a practical and reproducible approach for integrating security testing into performance-driven development environments while preserving speed, quality, and delivery confidence._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience, the session connects software engineering, DevSecOps, cloud reliability, automation, and operational monitoring. It explains why traditional performance testing often focuses on legitimate user behavior under load, while security testing is usually executed separately with adversarial inputs. This separation creates blind spots, especially when vulnerabilities appear only under realistic concurrency, resource pressure, and production-like conditions._x000D_
_x000D_
The talk introduces a structured framework that teams can apply within existing delivery workflows. The approach includes pre-deployment configuration validation, security-focused traffic during load testing, and post-test correlation of security signals with performance metrics, application logs, and infrastructure behavior. Practical examples include denial-of-service conditions, authentication exhaustion, cryptographic bottlenecks, and other failures closely tied to system performance._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will leave with clear guidance for turning security validation into a collaborative engineering practice. The session emphasizes incremental adoption, shared ownership, automation, and measurable outcomes, making the content accessible for developers, architects, testers, cloud engineers, and technology leaders who want to build safer and more resilient digital systems.
tagline: Northwestern University, USA

title: Practical Zero Trust Security for Serverless Cloud Platforms
description:
Serverless and Function-as-a-Service platforms help teams build scalable, cloud-native applications quickly, but they also introduce short-lived and highly distributed execution environments that challenge traditional security models. This session presents a practical adaptive Zero Trust framework for securing cloud-native FaaS architectures, based on empirical research across major cloud providers._x000D_
_x000D_
The talk explains how function-level identity enforcement, fine-grained authorization, runtime behavioral monitoring, and adaptive policy controls can address security risks that are specific to serverless systems. These risks include cross-function attacks, dependency confusion, and timing-based exploitation, which conventional security mechanisms may struggle to detect consistently._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for a multitechnology audience, the session connects cloud security research with real-world implementation guidance. Attendees will learn how adaptive Zero Trust controls can improve threat detection and prevention while maintaining the scalability and efficiency that make serverless platforms valuable. The presentation also discusses performance and operational impact, including how behavioral baselining can reduce false alerts and improve usability for security teams._x000D_
_x000D_
The session concludes with reproducible architectural guidance for applying Zero Trust principles in serverless environments without requiring major changes to application code. It is relevant for cloud architects, developers, DevSecOps engineers, and platform security teams who want to adopt serverless technologies securely and translate modern cloud security concepts into practical, applicable solutions.
tagline: Independent Researcher, California, United States

title: Cloud-Native Enterprise Architecture for Faster Digital Transformation
description:
Modern enterprises are under constant pressure to accelerate digital transformation while managing legacy systems, security requirements, and increasing operational complexity. This session provides a practical roadmap for adopting cloud-native enterprise architecture using proven technologies and implementation strategies that organizations can apply in real-world environments._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will learn how containerization, microservices, and service mesh improve scalability, resilience, and deployment speed across enterprise applications. The session also demonstrates how zero-trust architecture, compliance-as-code, and modern governance practices help organizations strengthen security and simplify regulatory compliance without slowing innovation._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation covers practical modernization approaches, including the strangler pattern, hybrid refactoring, and re-platforming, allowing teams to modernize existing systems incrementally while reducing operational risk. In addition, attendees will explore how DevOps, FinOps, and platform engineering practices enable faster software delivery, better collaboration, and improved cloud cost management._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for architects, developers, and technology leaders, this session combines architectural guidance with practical implementation strategies and real-world modernization approaches that participants can adapt within their own organizations. Attendees will leave with actionable insights for building scalable, secure, and resilient cloud-native platforms that support sustainable digital transformation and long-term business value.
tagline: Sheffield Hallam

title: AI Search Revolution: Building Conversational Search Experiences
description:
Artificial Intelligence is transforming digital search by moving beyond traditional keyword matching to conversational, context-aware interactions. This session explores how modern AI technologies are changing the way users discover information and how developers can build intelligent search experiences using proven architectural patterns._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will learn the core components behind conversational search, including natural language processing, transformer-based language models, dialogue management, context preservation, and multimodal AI. The session explains how these technologies work together to improve query understanding, maintain conversation context, and deliver more relevant, personalized responses._x000D_
_x000D_
Using practical examples and real-world implementation concepts, the presentation highlights design considerations for building conversational search applications, including scalability, user experience, privacy, and responsible AI practices. It also discusses common implementation challenges, such as maintaining conversational coherence, reducing bias, and integrating multiple AI capabilities into production systems._x000D_
_x000D_
Participants will leave with a clear understanding of the architecture behind conversational AI search, current industry adoption trends, and practical approaches they can apply in their own projects. Whether building enterprise applications, intelligent assistants, or AI-powered information systems, attendees will gain actionable insights into creating more natural, efficient, and user-centric search experiences using modern AI technologies.
tagline: The Wharton School at University of Pennsylvania, USA

title: Using AI Analytics to Improve ACA Risk Adjustment Performance
description:
Artificial Intelligence and advanced analytics are transforming how healthcare organizations manage Affordable Care Act (ACA) risk adjustment. This session demonstrates how AI-powered data analytics helps health plans improve financial performance, strengthen compliance, and streamline operations through practical, data-driven solutions._x000D_
_x000D_
Using real-world ACA risk adjustment scenarios, we will explore how predictive analytics, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and intelligent data integration improve HCC capture, enhance risk prediction, and uncover opportunities hidden within structured and unstructured healthcare data. Attendees will learn how modern analytics has evolved from traditional reporting to AI-enhanced predictive models that deliver measurable improvements in accuracy, efficiency, and return on investment._x000D_
_x000D_
The session also examines common implementation challenges, including fragmented data sources, data quality issues, and operational constraints, along with practical approaches for overcoming them using scalable analytics platforms and AI-driven workflows. Real implementation outcomes will illustrate improvements in processing efficiency, member matching accuracy, provider engagement, and compliance monitoring._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for developers, data professionals, AI practitioners, and technology enthusiasts, this presentation focuses on reproducible concepts that can be applied to modern analytics solutions beyond healthcare. Participants will gain practical insights into building intelligent, data-driven systems that combine AI, analytics, and cloud technologies to solve complex business problems while maintaining regulatory compliance and delivering measurable business value.
tagline: Osmania University, Hyderabad, India

title: Slurm vs Kubernetes: Choosing the Right Platform for Enterprise Workloads
description:
Modern enterprises increasingly run a combination of HPC, AI, and cloud-native applications, making resource management a critical architectural decision. This session presents a practical, data-driven comparison of Slurm and Kubernetes based on insights from 187 production deployments, helping developers, architects, DevOps engineers, and IT leaders understand where each platform provides the greatest value._x000D_
_x000D_
Using real production metrics, we compare scheduling efficiency, resource allocation speed, memory footprint, scalability, recovery performance, and operational efficiency. The analysis highlights Slurm's strengths for HPC environments, including its adoption across 60% of the TOP500 supercomputers, management of more than 300,000 compute cores, and 93.7% scheduling efficiency. It also explores Kubernetes' leadership in container orchestration, with 96.8% market adoption, approximately 2 billion weekly deployments, and 99.99% service availability._x000D_
_x000D_
The session demonstrates how these metrics translate into real technology decisions by examining scheduling latency, throughput, resource utilization, controller failover recovery, and day-to-day operational performance. It also discusses how hybrid Slurm and Kubernetes environments can improve infrastructure resilience, workflow completion, and resource utilization compared with standalone implementations._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will gain practical guidance for selecting Slurm, Kubernetes, or a hybrid architecture based on workload characteristics, business objectives, and operational requirements. Drawing on empirical data from 14 supercomputing centers and 76 production Kubernetes environments, the session provides an evidence-based framework that participants can apply to HPC, AI, and enterprise cloud deployments. The goal is to help organizations make informed infrastructure decisions using measurable performance data and real-world operational experience.
tagline: California State university Long Beach

title: Agente de Gastos: El nuevo agente de Business Central
description:
En la nueva versión de Business Central, se ha presentado un nuevo agente.  Se trata de gestionar los gastos de empresa, categorizarlos y aprobarlos.  _x000D_
¿Quieres saber como funciona?  Te lo contaré en esta sesión.
tagline: Dual Microsoft MVP - MCT - Business Central Team Leader & PowerApps Developer

title: Creación Inteligente de Documentos con Copilot Studio y Plantillas Dinámicas
description: En esta sesión exploraremos cómo utilizar Copilot Studio para automatizar la generación de documentos empresariales a partir de plantillas predefinidas. Veremos cómo diseñar plantillas reutilizables, integrar fuentes de datos (Dataverse, SharePoint, APIs, etc.) y orquestar agentes que generen documentos personalizados en tiempo real. A través de un enfoque práctico, se mostrarán escenarios reales como generación de contratos, informes o documentación operativa, combinando IA generativa con automatización de procesos para mejorar la eficiencia y reducir el esfuerzo manual.
tagline: Practice Leader

title: OpenCode: Cuando los minions aterrizan en tu máquina local. Mas seguridad menos velocidad
description:
Claude Code se ha convertido en una referencia de los agentes de codificación en terminal, pero tiene un precio: dependes de Anthropic, pagas por token, y cuando los servidores se saturan… te quedas sin minions._x000D_
_x000D_
En esta sesión veremos qué es OpenCode, cómo funciona su arquitectura cliente/servidor, cómo conectarlo con modelos locales y qué ganamos —y qué sacrificamos— al traernos los minions a casa. Porque sí, hay un trade-off real: más control y privacidad a cambio de velocidad de respuesta. Libertad no es gratis, pero al menos esta vez la pagamos en watts, no en dólares.
tagline: Senior AI Engineer & Technical Lead at Devoteam | Multi-Agent Systems Architect

title: Certificaciones Power Platform: del track tradicional al enfoque AI‑first
description:
En esta sesión vamos a repasar los cambios recientes en el track de certificación de Power Platform, comparando el modelo anterior con el nuevo enfoque centrado en capacidades AI y Applied Skills. _x000D_
_x000D_
Qué veremos:  Exámenes que se retiran o se transforman, cómo mapear roles y trayectorias profesionales a las nuevas credenciales, y cómo comenzar a construir guías de estudio por examen con recursos oficiales de Microsoft Learn y labs recomendados. _x000D_
_x000D_
Finalmente veremos una propuesta de estrategia de estudio usando Copilot para mejorar la experiencia de aprendizaje y te prepares no solo para aprobar, sino para aprender.
tagline: Business Apps MVP | MCT | M365 & Power Platform Architect - knowmad mood

title: AI-Powered Database Observability: From Reactive to Predictive
description:
Modern cloud-native databases produce massive volumes of logs, metrics, and distributed traces, making it increasingly difficult to detect issues before they impact production. Traditional monitoring approaches struggle to keep pace with dynamic containerized environments where infrastructure changes continuously._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, you will learn how AI-powered observability enables engineering teams to move from reactive monitoring to predictive operations using practical techniques that can be integrated into existing environments. Through real-world examples, we will explore how organizations reduced Mean Time to Detection (MTTD) by up to 85%, improved Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by 75%, and increased alert accuracy from 20 to 30 percent to 80 to 90 percent, significantly reducing alert fatigue while preventing incidents before they escalated._x000D_
_x000D_
The session includes practical demonstrations of machine learning for log pattern recognition, anomaly detection with dynamic baselines that adapt to changing workloads, real-time streaming analytics for early issue detection, and event correlation techniques that identify the root cause of cascading failures across distributed systems._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will also learn practical implementation strategies, including model training considerations, integration with existing observability platforms such as Prometheus and Datadog, and automation workflows that proactively remediate common database issues._x000D_
_x000D_
The goal is to provide reproducible techniques and actionable guidance that developers, DevOps engineers, and database professionals can apply to build more resilient cloud-native systems using AI-powered observability.
tagline: Sr Systems Development Engineer at Google LLC

title: AI-Driven Fraud Detection in Cloud Banking with Azure
description:
Financial fraud is evolving faster than traditional rule-based detection systems can respond. Modern attacks use synthetic identities, real-time social engineering, and AI-assisted techniques that require more intelligent and adaptive security approaches._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, we will explore how cloud-native architectures on Azure and artificial intelligence can be combined to build scalable, adaptive fraud detection systems for digital banking. Starting from the limitations of conventional rule-based models, we will demonstrate how cloud services enable real-time data processing, elastic scalability, and continuous model improvement._x000D_
_x000D_
The session will cover practical AI techniques, including ensemble learning, deep learning, and real-time inference, showing how they can detect complex fraud patterns across high-volume transaction data. We will also discuss how these models can improve detection accuracy while reducing false positives and supporting regulatory compliance._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will learn architectural patterns, implementation considerations, and best practices for building AI-powered fraud detection solutions using cloud technologies. The concepts presented are applicable to financial services and other industries that require real-time risk analysis and intelligent decision-making._x000D_
_x000D_
The session is designed for developers, cloud architects, AI practitioners, and technology enthusiasts seeking practical approaches that they can reproduce and adapt in their own environments.
tagline: Independent Author

title: Modernizing SAP O2C and EDI with AI for Smarter Manufacturing
description:
Manufacturing organizations are under increasing pressure to deliver faster, more accurate, and more connected business processes. This session demonstrates how modernizing SAP Order-to-Cash (O2C) and Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) with SAP S/4HANA, AI, RPA, and cloud technologies can improve operational efficiency while reducing manual work and errors._x000D_
_x000D_
Using real-world implementation examples and industry research, attendees will explore practical approaches to streamlining O2C and EDI processes, improving data quality, enabling real-time visibility, and accelerating trading partner integration. The session highlights how intelligent automation supports touchless transactions, faster order processing, improved cash management, and more resilient supply chain operations._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation also covers proven implementation practices, including phased migrations, change management, leadership alignment, and measuring business outcomes. These lessons are applicable to organizations planning or actively executing SAP modernization initiatives._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed as a technical and practical session, attendees will gain actionable guidance that can be adapted to their own SAP environments. Whether you are a developer, architect, consultant, or IT leader, you will leave with reproducible strategies for modernizing O2C and EDI processes and accelerating digital transformation in manufacturing.
tagline: Sr.Systems Analyst at 3R Info

title: Orchestrating Multi-Cloud Innovation for Enterprise Excellence
description:
Modern enterprises are increasingly adopting multi-cloud architectures to build scalable, resilient, and intelligent digital platforms. This session presents a practical approach to designing and managing multi-cloud environments using proven technologies and real-world implementation strategies that participants can apply in their own organizations._x000D_
_x000D_
Through enterprise case studies, attendees will learn how container orchestration improves application portability and scalability, how Infrastructure as Code (IaC) accelerates automation and standardizes deployments, and how AI-driven cloud optimization enhances performance, resource utilization, and operational efficiency across cloud platforms._x000D_
_x000D_
The session also addresses the security and governance challenges of operating distributed cloud environments and demonstrates practical techniques to strengthen resilience, improve compliance, and simplify operations. Examples from finance, healthcare, retail, and manufacturing illustrate how organizations have reduced infrastructure costs, accelerated application delivery, improved healthcare data processing, and enhanced product quality through edge-to-cloud integration._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for developers, cloud engineers, architects, and technology leaders, this session combines technical insights with practical guidance and reproducible enterprise use cases. Attendees will leave with actionable strategies to standardize cloud operations, increase agility, strengthen governance, and leverage AI and cloud-native technologies to drive innovation across modern multi-cloud environments.
tagline: Sr. Systems Engineer  at CybeCys Inc

title: Conversational AI for Industrial Maintenance: Practical AI to Reduce Downtime
description:
Conversational AI is becoming a practical tool for modern industrial maintenance, helping technicians diagnose equipment issues faster, improve repair quality, and support predictive maintenance. This session demonstrates how conversational AI, combined with IoT data and augmented reality (AR), can be integrated into existing maintenance workflows to deliver measurable operational improvements._x000D_
_x000D_
Using real-world implementation results, the session presents how organizations have reduced unplanned downtime by up to 57.3%, achieved average annual savings of €3.4 million per plant, and improved diagnostic accuracy by 41.3%. Participants will also see how AI-assisted workflows increased first-attempt resolution rates from 56.4% to 81.2%, while AR-enabled guidance reduced repair times by 46.7% and lowered error rates in complex electrical repairs by 82.4%._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation explains how conversational AI processes equipment data to support predictive maintenance with 97.2% accuracy in detecting early failures, reducing maintenance costs while extending asset life. It also explores how natural language interfaces reduce technician cognitive load by 62.4%, accelerate decision-making by 73.8%, and improve collaboration by shortening expert escalation times by 78.3%._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed as a practical technical session, attendees will learn implementation strategies, architectural considerations, integration challenges such as ontology mapping and workforce adoption, and best practices for deploying conversational AI within industrial environments. The session concludes with an overview of emerging capabilities, including digital twins and multimodal AI, providing attendees with actionable insights they can apply to their own AI and industrial modernization initiatives.
tagline: Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur

title: Architectural Patterns for Human-AI Collaboration in the Enterprise
description:
Artificial Intelligence is transforming enterprise applications, but the greatest value comes from designing systems where humans and AI work together effectively. This session presents practical architectural patterns for building scalable human-AI collaboration solutions using modern enterprise architectures._x000D_
_x000D_
Through real-world enterprise examples from industries including financial services, healthcare, and customer service, attendees will explore how organizations combine AI with human decision-making to improve efficiency and business outcomes. The session covers architectural components such as context preservation, adaptive workflows, real-time analytics, and monitoring frameworks that enable reliable collaboration between users and AI systems._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation also demonstrates how continuous feedback loops and operational metrics help optimize task allocation, system performance, and user experience. Participants will learn why successful implementation depends not only on architecture, but also on human-centered design, governance, and organizational adoption._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for architects, developers, and technology professionals, this session focuses on practical, reproducible approaches that attendees can apply in their own organizations. The discussion highlights architectural decisions, implementation considerations, and lessons learned for building enterprise solutions that balance AI capabilities with human oversight, resulting in scalable, responsible, and effective collaboration.
tagline: Uttar Pradesh Technical University

title: AI Agents for Enterprise Integration with iPaaS: Practical Hyperautomation
description:
Enterprise integration is entering a new phase with AI agents embedded within Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS) platforms. These intelligent software agents move beyond traditional rule-based automation by understanding context, processing structured and unstructured data, and making real-time decisions that simplify complex integration scenarios._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, we will explore how AI agents enhance enterprise integration by automating data synchronization, orchestrating workflows, and connecting business applications with greater intelligence and flexibility. Unlike general-purpose AI agents used for chatbots or recommendation systems, iPaaS AI agents are designed specifically for integration challenges, enabling faster automation with less manual effort._x000D_
_x000D_
Through practical examples, including Workato's AI agent Genie, attendees will see how AI agents can monitor business events, extract information from emails and documents, trigger context-aware workflows, and continuously improve automation outcomes. The session will also discuss where human approval and governance remain essential to ensure responsible and secure AI adoption._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will gain a clear understanding of the differences between traditional integration automation and AI-driven orchestration, learn where AI agents deliver the greatest value, and discover practical patterns that can be applied to enterprise integration projects today. Whether you are an integration developer, architect, or automation enthusiast, this session provides actionable insights into building intelligent, scalable, and trustworthy hyperautomation solutions with modern iPaaS platforms.
tagline: Technical Architect at Workato

title: Reducing LLM Hallucinations with Cross-Verification Using Multiple Models
description:
Large Language Models (LLMs) have become powerful tools for generating content through prompt engineering, enabling practical applications across software development, automation, and AI-driven solutions. However, hallucinations, where models generate inaccurate or fabricated information, remain one of the biggest challenges when deploying LLMs in production environments. While prompt refinement and stricter generation constraints can reduce these errors, they cannot eliminate them completely._x000D_
_x000D_
This session presents a practical approach for improving the reliability of LLM-generated content through cross-verification using multiple language models. The presentation is based on an experiment using Anthropic Claude and Llama in a two-step validation workflow. Claude generated concise summaries of book titles using only structured input attributes, including title, release date, and other provided metadata, with explicit instructions not to introduce new information. Llama then verified each generated summary against the original input, identifying fabricated content, self-referential text, incomplete sentences, and other quality issues._x000D_
_x000D_
The experiment evaluated approximately 1,800 to 2,000 generated summaries. Despite multiple iterations of prompt refinement, between 1% and 3% of the outputs still contained hallucinated information. The results demonstrate that prompt engineering alone is insufficient for eliminating hallucinations, while cross-verification provides an effective and reproducible quality assurance layer that significantly improves output reliability._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will gain practical insights into designing multi-model validation workflows, understand the limitations of current LLMs, and learn techniques that can be applied to build more reliable AI-powered applications and content generation pipelines.
tagline: Sr. Software Engineer at Amazon.com Services LLC

title: Enhancing Human AI Collaboration with Intelligent AI Optimized Data Systems
description:
Artificial Intelligence is transforming how developers build intelligent applications, but the quality of AI experiences depends heavily on the data systems that power them. This session explores how AI optimized data systems improve application performance and strengthen human AI collaboration through adaptive indexing, intelligent query planning, and workload aware optimization._x000D_
_x000D_
Rather than focusing only on theory, this talk demonstrates how modern data platforms can reduce latency, improve responsiveness, and provide AI models with faster access to relevant information. Attendees will gain practical insights into how these optimizations support common AI workloads, including intelligent search, machine learning, and real time decision making._x000D_
_x000D_
The session also highlights reproducible use cases from industries such as healthcare, finance, and research, illustrating how intelligent data systems enable faster analysis, more informed decisions, and more effective collaboration between people and AI. These examples provide patterns and best practices that developers and technology professionals can apply in their own environments._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for developers, architects, and AI enthusiasts, this session connects modern AI concepts with practical implementation strategies. Participants will leave with a clearer understanding of how intelligent data systems create more scalable, responsive, and reliable AI solutions, enabling organizations to build applications that combine human expertise with machine intelligence more effectively.
tagline: University of Southern California (USC)

title: Self-Optimizing Funnels with Governed Agentic AI for Real-Time Attribution
description:
Modern customer journeys span websites, advertising platforms, email campaigns, CRM systems, and many other digital touchpoints. Traditional multi-touch attribution (MTA) models rely on static rules and delayed analysis, making it difficult to understand customer behavior and optimize marketing performance while campaigns are running._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, I will demonstrate how Agentic AI, combined with strong Data Governance, enables a self-optimizing marketing funnel that continuously learns from customer interactions and improves attribution in real time._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will learn how Agentic AI processes governed customer events across multiple channels, dynamically assigns attribution based on the incremental impact of each interaction, and automatically recommends or performs optimizations such as budget redistribution, bid adjustments, channel optimization, and personalized interventions. The session will also explain how trusted data lineage, identity resolution, privacy compliance, and continuous data quality monitoring provide the governance framework that makes autonomous AI decisions reliable and responsible._x000D_
_x000D_
Using practical architecture patterns and implementation concepts, this session will show how governed data, real-time attribution, and AI-driven optimization form a continuous feedback loop that improves marketing performance while maintaining transparency and compliance._x000D_
_x000D_
Participants will leave with a clear understanding of how to design governed Agentic AI solutions for real-time attribution, the key architectural components involved, and practical approaches they can apply when building intelligent marketing and analytics solutions on modern cloud platforms.
tagline: Data Stewardship Manager II at walmart inc

title: Scalable Data Lakehouse Strategies for AI and Machine Learning
description:
Modern AI and machine learning solutions depend on reliable, scalable data platforms. A Lakehouse architecture brings together the flexibility of data lakes and the performance of data warehouses, enabling organizations to manage structured, semi structured, and unstructured data within a single platform._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, we will explore the fundamentals of the Lakehouse approach and examine how technologies such as Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg, and Apache Hudi provide capabilities including ACID transactions, schema enforcement, and time travel. These features help build trustworthy data pipelines while supporting analytics and machine learning workloads at scale._x000D_
_x000D_
Through practical architecture examples and implementation strategies, attendees will learn how Lakehouse platforms support real time streaming, batch processing, and ML model training in the same environment. The session will also discuss representative use cases that demonstrate how organizations can create modern data platforms capable of serving both analytics and AI initiatives._x000D_
_x000D_
Designed for developers, data engineers, and cloud professionals, this session focuses on practical concepts and implementation guidance that attendees can apply when building scalable, AI ready data platforms using open Lakehouse technologies.
tagline: University of Illinois at Chicago

title: Building Observable and Responsible Machine Learning Systems for Production on Azure
description: Deploying machine learning models is only the beginning of delivering reliable AI solutions. Sustained success depends on comprehensive observability that continuously monitors model quality, operational health, data integrity, and responsible AI practices. This session presents a practical framework for building production-ready monitoring systems that provide end-to-end visibility into machine learning workloads deployed on modern cloud platforms. Participants will explore techniques for tracking model performance through metrics such as precision, recall, F1-score, and AUC while simultaneously detecting data drift, feature distribution changes, prediction anomalies, and infrastructure bottlenecks. The presentation also demonstrates how fairness indicators and automated alerting can be integrated into operational workflows to support trustworthy AI deployments. Using Azure-native services and modern monitoring architectures, attendees will learn how telemetry, dashboards, automated responses, and self-healing workflows can reduce operational overhead while improving system reliability. Real-world implementation examples illustrate how engineering teams can proactively identify issues before they affect users and establish repeatable monitoring practices across multiple machine learning applications. Ideal for developers, data scientists, DevOps engineers, and cloud architects, this session delivers practical guidance for creating resilient, observable, and scalable AI systems that maintain high performance, operational transparency, and responsible governance throughout the entire machine learning lifecycle.
tagline: Quantitative Developer at Citadel

title: Despliega de manera eficiente soluciones en DataVerse
description: Microsoft recomienda utilizar soluciones administradas pero la realidad es que es bastante tedioso lidiar con ellas el día a día. Si quieres vente y te enseño los tips y mi experiencia para lograr una implantación impecable de tus desarrollos en Microsoft DataVerse

description: La IA ya genera una Power App en minutos… pero un esqueleto generado no enamora a nadie. En esta charla veremos cómo combinar el vibe coding con buenos diseños en Canvas Apps para crear aplicaciones que, además de funcionar, los usuarios quieran usar.
tagline: Prodware

title: Autonomous Cognitive Navigation: AI-Powered End-to-End Testing with Natural Language
description:
Modern software applications evolve rapidly, making traditional end-to-end test automation increasingly difficult to maintain. Script-based testing frameworks that depend on fixed UI elements often require continuous updates whenever interfaces change, reducing development efficiency and slowing software delivery._x000D_
_x000D_
In this session, we will explore Autonomous Cognitive Navigation (ACN), a Natural Language Based (NLB) generative framework that leverages Large Language Models to execute end-to-end testing through natural language instructions instead of brittle test scripts. Attendees will learn how AI can understand application state, reason through complex user journeys, and dynamically adapt to interface changes without requiring extensive manual maintenance._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation demonstrates three core capabilities of the framework. First, a Persistent Temporal Action Memory maintains execution history to prevent repetitive navigation and improve decision making. Second, a Semantic Canonicalization process simplifies complex UI structures, enabling faster and more efficient reasoning. Third, a multimodal verification engine validates application outcomes using visual understanding, allowing tests to remain reliable even after UI redesigns._x000D_
_x000D_
Through practical demonstrations and reproducible implementation concepts, attendees will discover how generative AI can modernize software quality engineering, simplify the creation of new test scenarios, and improve the resilience of automated testing across multilingual applications and evolving digital platforms._x000D_
_x000D_
This session is intended for software developers, QA engineers, architects, and technology professionals interested in applying Artificial Intelligence to modern software development, Azure-based development environments, and intelligent automation within contemporary CI/CD workflows. Participants will leave with practical ideas they can apply to build more adaptive, scalable, and maintainable testing solutions.
tagline: Senior Engineering Manager at Uber

title: Machine Learning for Scalable Intellectual Property Protection in Cloud Environments
description:
Modern organizations increasingly rely on cloud platforms to create, store, and manage valuable intellectual property, making effective protection more important than ever. This session demonstrates how machine learning can help detect, analyze, and prevent unauthorized use of digital assets through practical, cloud-native solutions that developers and architects can apply in real-world environments._x000D_
_x000D_
Attendees will explore how keyword search, semantic similarity models, natural language processing, and computer vision work together to identify potential intellectual property violations across documents, source code, images, and other digital content. The session explains how hybrid machine learning approaches improve detection quality while reducing false positives, making automated protection more reliable than traditional manual review processes._x000D_
_x000D_
The presentation also covers how cloud platforms enable these solutions to scale efficiently, integrate with existing security workflows, and optimize infrastructure costs. Through practical implementation guidance and real-world architectural patterns, participants will learn how to design intelligent monitoring systems that remain responsive as data volumes and workloads grow._x000D_
_x000D_
Finally, the session looks at emerging innovations, including AI-assisted security automation and quantum-resistant encryption, and discusses how these technologies can strengthen future intellectual property protection strategies. Attendees will leave with practical knowledge, implementation ideas, and cloud-native best practices that they can adapt to their own applications and enterprise environments.
tagline: Software Development Engineer II at Amazon.com

title: Copilot sin líos: licencias, costes y qué puede hacer de verdad por ti
description:
¿Copilot, Copilot Chat, Microsoft 365 Copilot, Copilot Pro… y ahora Cowork? Si te has perdido entre tantos nombres parecidos, esta sesión pone orden._x000D_
_x000D_
Sin tecnicismos, recorremos todo lo que necesitas saber para decidir qué versión te conviene: qué es cada Copilot, qué licencia necesitas, cuánto cuesta, cómo se instala y —lo más importante— qué tareas reales puede quitarte de encima cada uno._x000D_
_x000D_
Después daremos el salto a la gran novedad: Copilot Cowork, el asistente que deja de limitarse a responder y pasa a ejecutar encargos completos por ti —ordenar tu calendario, preparar el material de una reunión, investigar una empresa o montar un plan de lanzamiento— siempre bajo tu supervisión y aprobación._x000D_
_x000D_
Saldrás con las ideas claras, ejemplos concretos para aplicar desde el lunes y una regla de oro: la IA propone, pero tú decides.
tagline: CoFounder of CursosPowerBI.es

title: Aspire para developers: menos configuración, más código y mejor observabilidad
description:
Levantar una API, una base de datos, un frontend, telemetría y varios servicios debería ser fácil. O al menos no debería necesitar una mañana completa, cuatro terminales abiertas y un documento llamado setup-final-v7.md._x000D_
_x000D_
En esta sesión veremos las últimas novedades de Aspire y cómo pueden simplificar el trabajo diario de los desarrolladores: ejecutar aplicaciones distribuidas, conectar servicios, añadir dependencias, observar qué está pasando y preparar el camino hacia producción._x000D_
_x000D_
Habrá demos, errores en directo —probablemente— y ejemplos prácticos para empezar a usar Aspire sin necesidad de rehacer toda tu arquitectura._x000D_
_x000D_
Aspire no elimina la complejidad del cloud. Pero al menos evita que tengas que sufrirla toda al mismo tiempo.
tagline: Principal Cloud Advocate 🥑 @Microsoft

title: Agentes y skills de Microsoft Fabric desde GitHub Copilot
description:
¿Y si pudieras administrar tu tenant de Microsoft Fabric, construir una app sobre tus datos o montar una arquitectura medallion completa... simplemente pidiéndoselo en lenguaje natural a GitHub Copilot? Eso es exactamente lo que traen los nuevos agentes y skills de Microsoft Fabric (microsoft/skills-for-fabric)._x000D_
_x000D_
En esta sesión, David Rodríguez te enseñará, con demos en vivo y de las que tiemblan, cómo sacarle partido a los cuatro agentes especializados:_x000D_
_x000D_
FabricAdmin - gobernanza, capacidades, control de acceso, inventario y documentación de workspaces. La parte "aburrida" pero crítica, ahora resuelta a golpe de prompt._x000D_
_x000D_
FabricAppDev - desarrollo full-stack sobre Fabric con Python, ODBC, XMLA y REST APIs para construir aplicaciones conectadas a tus datos._x000D_
_x000D_
FabricDataEngineer - flujos end-to-end de ingeniería de datos: Spark, Warehouse, Pipelines, arquitectura Lakehouse, migraciones y calidad de datos._x000D_
_x000D_
FabricIQ: responde preguntas sobre datos de reportes y modelos semánticos de Power BI, descubriendo artefactos, generando consultas DAX y ejecutándolas para dar respuestas concretas._x000D_
_x000D_
Te llevarás patrones concretos, buenas prácticas y la receta para empezar a usar todo esto en tu día a día. Si trabajas con datos en Fabric y quieres dejar de hacer clics repetitivos para empezar a conversar con tu plataforma, esta sesión es para ti.
tagline: CTO at Intelequia, Microsoft Regional Director and Azure MVP
